description_long: This object is a long, slender shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, and a metallic barrel and receiver. The stock is a traditional full stock, finished in a dark brown color, and the fore-end matches the stock in material and color. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a front sight post and a metallic finish, and there is a visible gas tube running parallel beneath the barrel, suggesting a semi-automatic action. The receiver is metallic and features a bolt and ejection port on the right side, with a trigger and a rounded trigger guard below. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function, typical of military or police shotguns used in urban environments.
description: A long, dark brown and metallic shotgun with a full wooden stock, metallic barrel, and a rounded trigger guard, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and receiver details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel and gas tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, barrel, and receiver from the other side, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver from behind.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, with a visible gas tube beneath the barrel and a front sight post
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
